name: Red Band
overview: Braccialetti Rossi is a story of friendship, values and life, a modern tale about the power of sharing, where protagonists are six young guys that the destiny brings together within a hospital. While laughing, playing, crying and gets excited, as only young people can do, a group is created taking the center of the story.

trailers.title: Braccialetti Rossi - Fiction RAI Uno - PROMO
